security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://asset.localhost https://api.github.com; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first Markdown notes & PKM with wiki links and knowledge graph
bundle.longDescription: Lunote is a free, open-source, cross-platform desktop app for Markdown note-taking and personal knowledge management (PKM). Store notes as plain .md files on your computer—no cloud or subscription. Features include visual and source editing, Obsidian-style wiki links, backlinks, knowledge graph, full-text search, themes, and export to PDF, Word, HTML, and PNG. Works offline on macOS, Windows, and Linux.
